highest_risks: Manuscript numerical text says x=theta and F=I while current defensible C7 uses theta plus clock drift.
Manuscript Step 3 covariance/MAP description omits C7 residual-scaled covariance, diagonal clipping, and safeguards.
C7 candidate outputs are non-final and not manuscript-ready.
Sparse C7 clock sweep is blocked by high-clock localization instability.
Single-UE rows must not be described as cooperative synchronization improvement.

manuscript_algorithm_components.use_in_numerical_results: used as initialization and no-cooperation baseline
used as cooperative coarse JCLS stage

assumptions: Gaussian prior and linearized likelihood for closed-form update
manuscript_algorithm_components.use_in_numerical_results: conceptual framework; numerical specialization must be reconciled with C7
stated manuscript results path, but not aligned to current C7 candidate

code_algorithm_components.input_output_state: UE positions, UE clocks, non-reference satellite clocks
DL-only per-UE position estimates packed into theta with zero clocks
code_algorithm_components.covariance_convention: weighted normal equations with range sigmas
legacy MAP covariance retained in migration step
code_algorithm_components.truth_usage: LM truth gate removed; offline metrics use truth

code_algorithm_components.units: position km, clock km, drift km/s
code_algorithm_components.fallback_behavior: revert clock and drift updates to Step B while preserving position update

code_algorithm_components.input_output_state: Step B baseline versus C7 refined rows
code_algorithm_components.units: sync ns in plots; range-domain km retained in raw CSV
code_algorithm_components.fallback_behavior: clock sweep blocked if high-clock rows degrade localization

parity_matrix.manuscript_says: theta contains UE positions, UE clocks, and non-reference satellite clocks; x includes at least theta and may include dynamics states.
parity_matrix.code_does: V24 theta matches; C7 uses x=[theta, clock_drift].
parity_matrix.recommended_action: Clarify whether final Step 3 results use identity state or augmented drift state.

parity_matrix.manuscript_says: First satellite is reference, delta_Nu+1=0, N_theta=4Nu+Ns-1.
parity_matrix.code_does: Reference satellite node id is Nu+1 and excluded from estimated clocks.
parity_matrix.recommended_action: Keep; add metric convention for synchronization averages.

parity_matrix.manuscript_says: Range-domain TOA model with transmitter/receiver clock differences and additive noise.
Model in meters/time offsets with c conversion; results in m/ns.
parity_matrix.code_does: Internal km and range-domain km; metrics converted to m/s/ns.
parity_matrix.recommended_action: Mention internal range-equivalent clock units only if needed.

parity_matrix.code_does: DL-only weighted GN with deterministic multistart and zero clocks.

parity_matrix.manuscript_says: LM over full theta initialized by Step 1 and zero clocks.
parity_matrix.code_does: Weighted LM over full gauged V24 theta.
Residual-cost/trust-region acceptance and no truth gate.
parity_matrix.recommended_action: Add numerical-method note if discussing defensible code.

parity_matrix.manuscript_says: Generic F,Q,P,Pi SCI/SFI model; numerical text says x=theta and F=I.
parity_matrix.code_does: Current C7 uses theta plus clock drift, not the identity-state numerical specialization.
parity_matrix.recommended_action: Reconcile final algorithm and numerical text.

parity_matrix.manuscript_says: Gaussian predicted covariance and information-form posterior covariance.
parity_matrix.code_does: Typed block-extracted, diagonal-clipped residual-scaled covariance from LM curvature.
parity_matrix.recommended_action: Caveat or revise if C7 becomes final.

parity_matrix.manuscript_says: Theory allows drift; numerical results say fixed offsets and x=theta.
parity_matrix.code_does: C7 appends and updates clock drift.
parity_matrix.recommended_action: Must reconcile before using C7 results.

parity_matrix.code_does: Generic Pi=I; C7 projects by slicing theta from theta-plus-drift state.
parity_matrix.recommended_action: Describe selection projection for augmented state if C7 is final.

parity_matrix.manuscript_says: Linearized Gaussian prior/likelihood yields posterior mean and MAP estimate.
parity_matrix.code_does: Generic helper implements information-form EKF; C7 uses one safeguarded linearized update.
parity_matrix.recommended_action: Condense generic prose; avoid overclaiming standard EKF adoption.

parity_matrix.code_does: C7 reverts unsafe clock/drift updates using non-truth diagnostics.
parity_matrix.recommended_action: Add numerical-method caveat if C7 is used.

parity_matrix.manuscript_says: Single UE cannot exploit cooperation and uses conventional TOA.
parity_matrix.code_does: C7 recreation uses Nu=1 only as no-cooperation baseline; candidate validation has fallback equality.

parity_matrix.manuscript_says: Average UE localization error and average node synchronization error after 0.5 s.
parity_matrix.code_does: Position mean in m; sync relative to reference satellite excluding reference, seconds/ns for plots.

parity_matrix.manuscript_says: Current figures and result prose imply final refined JCLS trends.
parity_matrix.code_does: C7 outputs are non-final, candidate-only, not manuscript-ready; sparse clock sweep is blocked.
parity_matrix.recommended_action: Do not use C7 outputs as final manuscript evidence without approval and final rerun.

must_fix_before_submission: Reconcile numerical Step 3 state/dynamics text with final code path.
Do not present current C7 outputs as final manuscript evidence.
If C7 is final, mention residual-scaled covariance and safeguards as numerical-method caveats.
Define synchronization metric relative to reference satellite and excluding reference clock.
safe_wording: The proposed framework consists of a DL-only coarse localization stage, a cooperative joint position/clock LM stage, and a dynamic soft-information refinement stage.
In the current C7 candidate implementation, the refinement state augments the gauged position/clock vector with clock-drift components.
The C7 covariance is a typed block-extracted, diagonal-clipped residual-scaled covariance used as a numerical safeguard.
Single-UE cases cannot exploit sidelink cooperation; they are treated as a no-cooperation baseline or as safeguarded non-observable clock-update cases.
Current C7 outputs are non-final diagnostics for human review.
unsafe_wording: The current sparse clock sweep validates the final refined-JCLS clock-sweep figures.
The C7 covariance is a dense block covariance or cross-covariance method.
The reported refined-JCLS results are produced by a generic EKF/MAP filter unless the final code path actually uses that filter without C7 safeguards.
